content:
守密人你好：
       彌薩格大學校務處將於3月20日15:40進行校內設施修復，更新完成後您將得到通知，重新進入遊戲。對於更新可能給大家帶來的不便，我們會準備一份補給物資以示歉意。祝大家調查順利！ 
  
【補給物資】
在線維護補償：銀芯*50
  
【領取條件】
領取時間截至2025年4月3日23:59。請記得及時前往郵箱領取補給物資哦。  
 
【更新內容】
● 修復了部分「卡牌」描述中數值顯示錯誤的問題。
● 修復了限定命輪卡池規則說明-SSR物品基礎出率-玩家當前指定常駐命輪也錯誤顯示了UP標記的問題。

V2.1.1.5 Online Maintenance Notice
 
Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on March 20 at 15:40(UTC+8). You will be notified once the update is complete and can re-enter the game. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
    
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
    
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on April 3 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
     
【Update Content】
● Fixed incorrect value display in some "card" descriptions.
● Fixed the issue where the SSR item base rate in the limited wheel of destiny pool rules incorrectly showed the UP mark for the player's currently designated permanent wheel of destiny.
